programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Festive romance with Jennifer Finnigan and Jonathan Scarfe. Journalist Susan digs into her family history to find the perfect Christmas story. Will a mysterious ornament lead to true love? (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Children's Children: A sensationalist reporter uncovers a secret about a woman running a home for young mothers. Meanwhile, a teenage boy must face the fact that he's going to be a father.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
